active.note: Claude-GLM fix 2 closed the residual BK-C-001 product behavior and passed its fake-only suite. Bookkeeper re-audit reproduced all six negative and key positive paths successfully. One required test was mechanically weakened: the second row in the multiple-CONFIRMED ambiguity test lacks timestamp, so it exercises malformed-row rejection rather than two fully contract-valid candidates. task-C-bookkeeper-fix-3.prompt.md is a test-evidence-only correction prepared for the human operator in the original Claude-GLM terminal. The stage remains implementing; review is not authorized and no live Binance write is authorized.

note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
